                                                                                                                    these efforts, it not only provides financing support to overcome the
                                                                                                                    material obstacles, but also unwaveringly aspires to be the vanguard
                                                                                                                    of the market credit system development. By now, CDB has trans-
                                                                                                                    formed from a “cashier” of the government in its early years of
                                                                                                                    establishment in 1994 into a development financial institution with
                                                                                                                    significant influence both at home and abroad. It has developed the
                                                                                                                    operational mode and theoretical framework of development-
                                                                                                                    oriented finance with Chinese characteristics, helped achieve national
                                                                                                                    strategies through market-oriented means, effectively implemented
                                                                                                                    the national macroeconomic policies, bolstered infrastructure
